title: Reassessing orality and post-literate vault structures
first_prompt:
GO to /Users/irwinchen/vaults. There are two vaults, one is called Orality and the other is PostLiterate. I have come to the realization that these are two separate projects. 

Orality is about Synthe
summary: Irwin sought to clarify and redefine his two existing Obsidian vaults, "Orality" and "PostLiterate," by narrowing the focus of the "Orality" vault to "Synthetic Orality," which addresses how fundamental orality is exploited by AI and social media. The conversation evolved into a detailed organizational plan where Irwin instructed the assistant to revise the vaults, specifically moving Bateson's work into the new Synthetic Orality structure. The assistant confirmed that because the git repository was set up at the parent
